misc: Primary organizer of the Hector Trophée event.
biography: Toni, a distinguished figure in the world of golf, hails from the esteemed Hirsala Golf club. Beyond his prowess on the course, Toni is known for his pivotal role as the primary organizer of the Hector Trophée event, a testament to his dedication to the sport.

With a remarkable record of 12 appearances in past Hector Trophée tournaments, Toni's presence is always keenly anticipated. His skill and strategic acumen have led him to secure the coveted Hector Trophée on three occasions, in addition to clinching the Victor Trophy twice, marking him as a formidable competitor in individual play.

Those who know Toni describe him as meticulous, with a keen eye for detail. This perfectionist attitude extends to all aspects of his life, from his golf swing to the organization of the Hector Trophée itself. As he prepares for his 13th appearance at Hector Trophée 2026, Toni remains an active and inspiring force in the world of golf.
